title: Meal log UI
summary: 기존 Planner의 식사 기록 세그먼트에 day-first MEAL_LOG를 구성하고, 저장된 local date 기준 영양 합계·끼니 이력과 요리한 음식·제품·재료 기록 흐름을 정확하게 표시한다.
goal: #9의 meal-log authority를 #10 Planner shell 안에서 소비하며, 불완전 영양·삭제된 끼니·배치 중량·제품 영양 버전·충돌 상태를 숨기지 않는 접근 가능한 기록 UI를 제공한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for any stage
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, security and API reviewer, five-axis reviewer, design critic, product-design-authority, implementation, Stage 3/6 and closeout; no self-approval

dependencies: meal-log-core Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1083; its runtime is the backend implementation predecessor
planner-shell Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1084; its runtime is the frontend shell implementation predecessor
prepared-food-search-relevance #1 supplies the typed union search contract
cooked-batch-weight-ui #11 is a sibling consumer of the same batch authority
legacy-product-compat #13 and cross-slice release QA #14 remain successors

external_smokes: owner day read selected-date totals and deleted-column history
three-source create edit delete own-event replay and conflict
recent frequent and single-cursor typed-union visibility
partial unavailable never zero or complete
390px 320px desktop visual accessibility and product-design-authority evidence

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/meal-log-ui.test.tsx tests/meal-log-add-sheet.test.tsx tests/meal-log-entry-mutations.test.tsx tests/meal-log-ui-history.test.tsx
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of five core artifacts plus roadmap and status
separate Codex security authorization and API boundary review
separate Codex design critic review of the new MEAL_LOG contract
separate Codex product-design-authority review of 390px 320px desktop runtime evidence
separate Codex Stage 3 Stage 6 and closeout reviews

out_of_scope: New Planner route tab API field status source or client-computed authoritative total
Weekly analysis goal medical interpretation calorie budget or nutrition coaching
Meal plan row mutation or HOME recommendation changes
Meal-log backend authority owned by #9 or Planner shell ownership owned by #10
Cooked batch lifecycle or weight control outside the eligible #11 action
Client-side product and ingredient result merge or brand-more pagination
Mutable-current product profile repin or ingredient conversion estimate
Deleted-column new entry or historical regroup by current timezone
Unmerged remote migration production write or feature activation
notes: Roadmap moves to docs while workflow lifecycle remains planned. Approval stays not_started until separate Codex internal1.5, security/API, five-axis and design reviews reach zero findings. Stage 1 current commands are docs validators/tests/lint/typecheck/audit/diff; component/E2E/visual/a11y/browser/remote evidence is future. Implementation waits for #9 runtime and #10 shell, consumes #1 search and #8 batch authority, may link the eligible #11 weight action, and leaves #13/#14 as successors.
